put.description: Update Duplicate Check Preference API is used to update duplicate check settings for a specific module in the CRM system. It allows users to define how duplicate records are identified and managed based on field mappings between the current module and a mapped module, such as Contacts. This API helps maintain data integrity by preventing the creation of duplicate records during data entry or import processes.
